content: Session started. New per-phase workflow: Context Load → Plan → Build+Test+Review. Executing Phase 2: Platform Connectors (arb-polymarket, arb-kalshi). Prior session built Phase 1 foundation (26 files, 8 crates, cargo check passes).

Context brief produced: all arb-types definitions, PredictionMarketConnector trait (11 methods), Polymarket auth (HMAC + EIP-712), Kalshi auth (RSA), dependencies, known gaps (G1 resolved, G3/G5 pending), security considerations from prior session.

Phase 2 build prompts produced: 9 sequential prompts (1 workspace + 4 polymarket + 4 kalshi). Design decisions: governor rate limiter, feature-gated mocks, exponential backoff reconnection, dual Kalshi rate limiter. Gap resolutions: G3 (reconnection), G5 (batch monitoring). File: docs/phase2-build-prompts.md.

Workspace Cargo.toml updated: alloy upgraded from 0.9 to 1.5 (serde compat fix), governor+rand added. Both crate Cargo.tomls expanded with all dependencies. Launched two Backend Devs in parallel for arb-polymarket and arb-kalshi.

arb-polymarket complete. 10 source files: error, types, auth (HMAC-SHA256), signing (EIP-712 with alloy 1.5), rate_limit (100 req/s), client (all REST endpoints), ws (reconnection with backoff), connector (11 trait methods), mock (feature-gated). 34 tests passing.

arb-kalshi complete. 9 source files: error, types, auth (RSA-SHA256 with PEM), rate_limit (dual: 10 trading/100 data), client (all REST endpoints), ws (auth + reconnection), connector (11 trait methods with cents→decimal), mock (feature-gated). 48 tests passing.

Code review complete. 0 critical, 3 high, 6 medium, 6 low, 9 info findings. Top issues: H1 PolyConfig Debug leaks secrets, H2 unwrap on header values can panic, H3 f64 financial math in EIP-712 signing. Also: M6 buy-only orders (no sell for unwinding), M1 no price bounds validation, M2 silent zero token_id. Good: correct crypto, no secrets in logs, proper feature-gating, 85 tests.

Phase 2 complete. 19 new source files, 85 tests passing, full workspace compiles. Both connectors implement all 11 PredictionMarketConnector trait methods. Code review found 3 high issues to fix before production (secret leakage in Debug, f64 financial math, header panics). Ready for Phase 3 (Matching + Detection).
